title: Samuel Groves Sandwich Cake Pan Tin Set - Superior Double Coated Non Stick - Fixed Base - UK Made (8" Twin Pack)
features: Superior Double Coated Non Stick: Ensures easy food release and effortless cleaning, making baking and cooking more enjoyable and less messy.
Heavy-Duty Material: Crafted from high-grade, heavy-duty materials, these tins offer superior cooking performance and durability, suitable for daily use in a busy kitchen.
Fixed Base: Provides stability and reliability for consistent baking results, ensuring your cakes and other baked goods come out perfectly every time.
Oven Safe Up to 230°C/445°F/Gas Mark 8: These tins are designed to withstand high temperatures, making them versatile for a variety of baking and cooking needs.

Non Stick, PFOA & BPA Free: Safe and healthy cooking with non-stick coating that is free from harmful chemicals, ensuring peace of mind while preparing your favorite dishes. Perfect for baking fruit/sponge/cheesecake cakes, pies, buns, loafs, pastries, quiche and more
description: Product Description 2X 8" (20cm) Birthday Victoria Sandwich Cake Tin Non Stick Fixed Base Made in England This best-selling range is non-stick which ensures uniform thickness, resulting in more even wear designed to bring the best out of your cake. With over 1000 products that offer outstanding performance every time, Samuel Groves allows you to accomplish what you want with flair, no matter your reason for cooking. Our bakeware makes it easy to cook your favourite meals to perfection every time. Rest assured it will instantly become a deeply treasured part of your kitchen. The non-stick cookware range is a well loved and very popular range of products that caters for every individual and offers a complete range of solutions for the home Aluminium is an extremely efficient heat conductor, it heats up quickly and produces a consistent, even bake - which is why it is the preferred choice of professional chefs. The History of Samuel Groves Established in 1817, Samuel Groves has become a trusted brand with professionals and home bakers the world over. Mermaid bakeware is made in the heart of Birmingham, UK and includes over 50 items of popular oven/bakeware, including roasters, baking trays, cake tins, pie and pudding tins and more specialised items. Please visit our website to see the full range of our products.
